title: Mapsoo Sunny Meadow — Free Pixel World Pack for Godot
short_description: Free CC0 layered terrain pack with Godot Terrain Sets, six props, and basic water collision.

generative_ai_disclosure.notes: Codex assisted project code and documentation. The downloadable ZIP contains no executable scripts; its pixel artwork is deterministic procedural output, not image-model output. No generated graphics or sound are included. This metadata remains an offline Draft while the GitHub prerelease is a candidate and itch.io upload is postponed.
